message:
fix(time,service): fix Sleep time-source mismatch and timeout_future test race

1. service/timeout.rs: TimeoutFuture::with_time_getter used Sleep::new
   (wall clock) but checked timeout with custom time_getter. When
   Future::poll was called for waker registration, the wall clock could
   complete the Sleep before the custom time advanced, causing "Sleep
   polled after completion" on next poll. Fix: use Sleep::with_time_getter
   so both clocks agree.

2. time/timeout_future.rs: Tests shared a static AtomicU64 CURRENT_TIME
   across parallel test threads, causing race conditions. Fix: use
   thread_local Cell<u64> and remove unnecessary static stores from
   tests that pass explicit times to poll_with_time.

3. io/copy.rs: cargo fmt fix for io::Error::other single-line style.

Closes asupersync-117l3.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
